properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The church where I grew up Would seat about 45 I was just a kid But I sure felt that preacher's fire Underneath the church pew Behind my momma's feet I had no idea that Jesus Was making plans for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take me back to the days of old When we lived by Faith alone Long live the love That conquered the grave Take me back to those days Of revival

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No dust on the hymnals All the ladies waved their fans The prayin' and the sweatin' They both went hand in hand We didn't have a lot of money Or programs after school But we sang loud on Sundays And didn't care if church was cool

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take me back to the days of old When we lived by Faith alone Long live the love That conquered the grave Take me back to those days Of revival Take me back to those days

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My first trip to the alter My stomach tied in knots Today I'm still believing In the Jesus that I got

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Take me back to the days of old When we lived by Faith alone Long live the love That conquered the grave Take me back to those days Take me back to those days Take me back to those days Of revival Of revival
